name: Wealth Project
short_description: Wealth Project is a fun and inspiring Visual Novel, Point & Click game with puzzles and mini-games made for anyone starting their wealth-building journey. Learn essential concepts like money management, goal setting, and net worth calculation while exploring success stories.
detailed_description:
Wealth Project is Here: Learn, Play, Prosper!

🚀 Start Your Journey Today! 🚀

Wealth Project is a game that will inspire both kids and adults to take control of their financial futures! 🎮💰

🔑 Key Features:

• Explore puzzles and point-and-click adventures based on real success stories

• Learn simple ways to manage money, calculate your net worth, and build meaningful life goals

• Discover how your dreams and career choices shape your path to wealth

Whether you’re just starting or already on the journey, Wealth Project offers an engaging way to learn essential life skills in a fun, interactive environment! 🌱

🛠 Thank you for your support: This is just the beginning—new content and updates are on the way! Be sure to follow and wishlist the game to stay in the loop. 🎉


About the Game

Wealth Project is an inspiring educational Puzzles and Point & Click game teaching kids and grown-ups about wealth, success stories and much more. The game is made for those who are starting their wealth journey.

What you will learn

How to get to present moment
How to manage money in a simple level and how to divide your things into assets and liabilities.
How to calculate your net worth
How choosing your career path and your dream affect the time it takes to reach them
How to ask advice from your future self
How to set life goals that are meaningful
